marketingRemarks.marketingRemark: Step into a home that instantly feels like yours. This beautifully updated residence in a smaller boutique building offers the rare blend of comfort, convenience, and community that buyers crave but seldom find. From the moment you walk in, natural light and thoughtful design invite you to imagine mornings that start peacefully and evenings that wind down effortlessly. The layout is exceptionally livable, featuring dual primary bedrooms with ensuite baths—perfect for guests, roommates, or simply enjoying the luxury of extra space. A separate office/den provides the ideal work‑from‑home setup or creative nook, giving you room to focus without sacrificing the openness of the main living area. The unit is well equipped with a newer washer and dryer, while the kitchen boasts a newer fridge and dishwasher, making everyday living refreshingly easy. Step outside to your private balcony overlooking the courtyard, a quiet retreat where you can sip coffee, unwind after a long day, or enjoy fresh air without ever leaving home. Life here extends far beyond your front door. The Metro is directly across the street, putting the entire region within effortless reach. You’re moments from Clarendon and Ballston, giving you instant access to vibrant dining, shops, gyms, run groups, and trails—everything you could ask for in an active, connected lifestyle. Friendly neighbors and the intimate scale of the building create a sense of community that’s hard to replicate.

Full-Sized W/ D in unit, Tankless Hot Water  &  Cute Balcony Ovrlookng Lvly Private Crtyrd! 2 Car Pkg  &  GIANT Storage Unit! Welcome to 2604 1st St S, a beautifully updated Arlington home ready for it's next chapter. Step inside to a bright, inviting interior filled with light, neutral paint, and upgraded ceramic and marble tile finishes that create a warm and welcoming atmosphere. The heart of the home is the BIG eat‑in kitchen with wood countertops, perfect for casual meals, lively gatherings, or quiet mornings with coffee. Hardwood floors flow throughout, complemented by four ceiling fans that keep the space comfortable year‑round. Upstairs, the primary bedroom with an ensuite offers thoughtful details including solid wood molding, a cedar closet, and cozy Berber carpet—an ideal retreat at the end of the day. A newer HVAC system ensures peace of mind and efficiency for years to come. Downstairs, a built-in dry bar complements the spacious lounge/movie time space. The utility room is tucked away for convenience. Outdoor living is matched by unbeatable convenience. With only two traffic lights to D. C. and close proximity to the Clarendon Metro, commuting and city adventures are effortless. Surrounded by shops, dining, and vibrant neighborhood amenities, this location places everything you need right at your fingertips.

Welcome to 1802 Key Blvd #9482, where modern updates meet everyday comfort in the heart of Arlington. The remodeled kitchen, featuring high-end materials and top-quality appliances, makes cooking a true pleasure—whether you’re preparing a quiet dinner for two or entertaining friends on the weekend. The open living and dining areas shine with upgraded flooring, fresh paint, and newer doors, creating a warm, polished backdrop for your personal style. Natural light fills the rooms, adding an inviting sense of space and calm. Every detail has been thoughtfully chosen so you can move right in and immediately feel at home. From your morning coffee in a bright kitchen to evenings unwinding in your stylish living room, this home offers the perfect balance of sophistication and ease—just minutes from all the dining, shopping, and energy of Clarendon and Court House. Mortgage savings may be available for buyers of this listing.

Experience the perfect blend of space and convenience in this 856 sq ft, 1-bedroom, 1-bath condo with a versatile den located in the heart of Arlington. This bright and freshly painted unit boasts major recent updates, including a brand new in-unit washer/dryer (2025) and a newer HVAC system (2022) for worry-free comfort. Enjoy hardwood floors, an upgraded kitchen with granite counters and stainless steel appliances, and a separate dining space. The private den is perfect for a home office or flex space. Step out onto the huge balcony for outdoor relaxation. With two assigned parking spaces (50  &  314), and an extra-large storage closet in the unit, everything you need is here. Live an amenity-rich life with a pool, fitness center, tennis courts, and 24-hour front desk. Just minutes from Shirlington, DC, and major commuting routes like 395, with direct access to Four Mile Run and W & OD Trails. This is Arlington living at its best!

Stunning Urban‑Farmhouse Marvel in the Heart of Arlington!  This exquisite Modern Farmhouse offers a rare opportunity to celebrate life’s most meaningful moments in a setting that blends contemporary elegance with timeless warmth. Light‑filled, beautifully crafted, and thoughtfully designed for luxurious living, this home invites you to gather, unwind, and create memories that last. Welcome to 1905 N Taylor Street, where modern sophistication meets enduring comfort in perfect harmony. Conceived by the award‑winning team at Moment Engineering  &  Design—honored with Best of Houzz and Best in American Living distinctions—this residence reflects a commitment to elevated craftsmanship, refined finishes, and effortless livability. From the moment you arrive, stone steps, manicured landscaping, and soft evening lighting set a tone of understated luxury. Inside, natural light and soaring ceilings create an atmosphere that feels both expansive and intimate. The heart of the home—the chef’s kitchen—centers around a striking Calacatta Barak quartz island and features a 6‑burner gas range, a 60‑inch Blomberg built‑in refrigerator, custom cabinetry, and a generous walk‑in pantry. The adjacent formal dining room flows seamlessly into the covered outdoor living area, complete with a gas fireplace, ceiling fan, and built‑in speakers—an all‑season retreat ideal for festive gatherings or quiet evenings by the fire. Every space is designed to inspire comfort and connection. With seven bedrooms and seven full baths, including a main‑level ensuite ideal for guests or multigenerational living, the home offers room for everyone to feel welcomed. A dramatic custom staircase serves as a sculptural centerpiece, while the top‑floor loft provides a versatile sanctuary for creativity, play, or peaceful retreat. The owner’s suite is a haven of indulgence, featuring a spa‑like bath and dual custom closets that elevate daily routines into moments of luxury. The finished lower level expands your lifestyle possibilities with a wine bar, cooler, guest suite, and flexible space perfect for a gym, media room, or both. Modern conveniences—including dual‑zone climate control, Cat‑6 wiring, a dedicated EV charger connection, and meticulous trimwork throughout—ensure the home is as functional as it is beautiful. At 1905 N Taylor Street, contemporary sophistication is infused with warmth at every turn. This is more than a house—it’s a place to live beautifully, gather joyfully, and create lasting memories. Schedule your private tour today!

Bright, sunny, and beautifully updated two-level, 2-bedroom, 1-bath townhome condo in the highly desirable Arlington Village community near the Pentagon! This charming home offers the perfect blend of comfort, modern updates, and historic character — all in one of Arlington’s most walkable and friendly neighborhoods. Enjoy a newly renovated kitchen with brand-new stainless steel appliances, quartz countertops, recessed lighting, fresh paint, new flooring, and in-unit washer and dryer. The primary bedroom boasts a redesigned Elfa closet system offering smart storage and style as well as ceiling fans in each bedroom for year-round comfort. The refurbished private deck with gate is ideal for relaxing with your pet, dining outdoors, or entertaining. Perfect for dog lovers, with scenic walking paths and nearby dog parks. This safe, friendly community features a sparkling summer pool and is just steps from coffee shops, restaurants, a drug store, and public transit. Commuters will love the easy access to DC, North Arlington, Shirlington, and I-395. Parking passes included. Move-in ready and full of charm—don’t miss this gem!

Welcome to 4801 29th St N, a beautifully updated home in the heart of Arlington’s sought-after Shirley Woods neighborhood. From the moment you arrive, you’ll feel a sense of space, comfort, and possibility. Step inside to discover a layout designed for living and entertaining. The expansive kitchen is the true heart of the home—perfect for gathering with family or hosting friends, with room to cook, connect, and create memories. With plenty of space throughout, every member of the household can enjoy privacy or come together with ease. The oversized two-car garage provides ample storage and convenience, while two brand-new A/C units ensure year-round comfort. Zoned for top-rated schools like Discovery Elementary and Yorktown High, this home is an investment in both lifestyle and long-term value. Just minutes from I-66, the GW Parkway, and downtown DC, the location offers unbeatable access without sacrificing neighborhood charm. With timeless appeal, thoughtful upgrades, and unmatched flexibility, this is a place where you can truly feel at home—now and for years to come. Mortgage savings may be available for buyers of this listing.

Discover Urban Oasis Living at The Brittany - Unit #910 Awaits with 2 dedicated parking spaces! Prime Opportunity and priced to sell at $325,000! Don’t Miss This North-Facing Gem in Arlington’s Sought-After South Side! Elevate your lifestyle in this spacious 1-bedroom, 1-bath condo spanning 856 sq ft of modern elegance at 4500 S Four Mile Run Dr #910, Arlington, VA 22204. Built in 2005 and meticulously maintained, this north-facing retreat floods with natural light, offering serene treetop views of the iconic Four Mile Run Trail - perfect for morning coffee rituals or unwinding after a bustling day in the DMV. With fresh updates and an open-concept layout, it’s move-in ready for professionals, empty-nesters, or savvy investors seeking high ROI in Arlington’s booming real estate market. Step into resort-style luxury with The Brittany’s world-class amenities designed for effortless living: -24/7 Concierge  &  Security for peace of mind around the clock -State-of-the-Art Fitness Center and two lighted Tennis Courts to keep your wellness game strong -Resort-Style Outdoor Pool  &  Sundeck with BBQ grills and picnic areas for summer soirees -Billiards room, media/movie theater, and clubhouse/party room for movie nights or social gatherings. -Cats and dogs welcome (with deposit) - your furry companions will love the on-site trails and playground. -Business center, elevators, jogging paths, and storage units for ultimate convenience. Unbeatable South Arlington Vibes Meet Big-City Access! Nestled in the vibrant Columbia Forest neighborhood along the gentle waters of Four Mile Run, you’re immersed in nature’s tranquility yet steps from urban excitement. Walk or bike the scenic Four Mile Run Trail for daily rejuvenation, then hop on the nearby Ballston-MU Metro (just 1.5 miles away) for a 10-minute commute to DC’s power corridors, the Pentagon, or Amazon HQ2. Indulge in local gems: 3 shopping centers within 1.4 miles (including Columbia Pike’s eclectic eats and boutiques), 5 parks for weekend adventures, and easy access to I-395 for seamless Northern VA exploration. Low HOA fees cover water, sewer, trash, and all these perks - value that rivals the best in luxury Arlington condos! This isn’t just a home, it’s your launchpad to Arlington’s dynamic lifestyle – where proximity to DC jobs, trails, and transit meets affordable luxury under $350K. Priced aggressively for a quick close, #910 won’t last so schedule your exclusive showing today and secure your slice of South Arlington paradise before it’s gone!

Welcome home to 2600 16th St S in Arlington, VA!  This beautiful two level townhouse style condo located in sought after Arlington Village. Tucked away on a quiet street in Arlington’s sought-after Douglas Park neighborhood, this thoughtfully updated single-family home offers an exceptional blend of location, functionality, and comfort. With its thoughtful updates, flexible floor plan, and unbeatable proximity to trails, dining, and commuting options, this Douglas Park residence delivers both lifestyle and long-term value in one of Arlington’s most convenient locations.

Beautifully updated and thoughtfully expanded, 712 S Wayne Street blends timeless architecture with modern comfort in a prime Arlington neighborhood - Penrose! A rear addition designed by architect Brian Harner creates an open, light-filled kitchen and dining area highlighted by 9-foot kitchen ceilings and an impressive 11-foot dining ceiling—perfect for both everyday living and entertaining. The kitchen features white quartz countertops, updated appliances, and seamless flow to the dining and mudroom areas. The main level is enhanced by a spacious living room with hardwood floors and a wood burning fireplace, custom laundry room with built-in storage and a recently renovated mudroom complete with a pet shower—an ideal setup for active households. The renovated lower level includes new flooring and a full bathroom, offering flexible space for guests, recreation, or home office use. Upstairs, three sunny bedrooms and two full bathrooms have been updated and further improved with new Toto toilets, while system upgrades throughout the home provide peace of mind, including Pella windows and exterior doors, a high-efficiency Bosch heat pump HVAC system, relined living room fireplace, updated sump pump and drainage system. Outdoors, professionally designed landscaping and hardscaping, a new front pathway, and low-maintenance native plantings enhance curb appeal and livability. This home is a standout opportunity in one of Arlington’s most sought-after neighborhoods. (Please see the UPDATES list in Document Section)

Welcome to an exceptional, fully reimagined residence in one of Rosslyn’s most distinguished addresses - The Belvedere. From the moment you step into the polished marble foyer, the home sets a tone of timeless sophistication and meticulous craftsmanship. Designed for both comfort and elevated living, this 2-bedroom, 2-bath condominium has been transformed with newer baths and a beautifully curated gourmet kitchen featuring gleaming stainless steel appliances, soapstone countertops, rich tile flooring, and an intimate breakfast room ideal for morning coffee or casual dining. Elegant architectural flow continues into the inviting family room, appointed with Brazilian Cherry flooring and custom built-in shelving, offering a warm and graceful space for entertaining or relaxation. The enclosed year-round sunroom, finished in tile, provides a serene retreat with memorable views toward the Jefferson Memorial, creating a stunning backdrop to daily living. Perfectly nestled in a premier urban setting, this home pairs luxury with unparalleled convenience with an oversized garage parking space, close proximity to Metro and public transit, shops dining and waterfront pathways. All of this and just minutes to Georgetown, The Kennedy Center and the National Mall. This is a rare opportunity to own a thoughtfully renovated and beautifully composed residence at The Belvedere — where classic details, modern comforts, and panoramic vistas unite in effortless harmony and all completed by the Belveder’s amazing amenities. Open House Sat Jan. 3rd 1-3pm.

A fantastic value at this price—don’t miss this opportunity.

Welcome home to this beautifully renovated condo perfectly positioned in the heart of National Landing. Freshly painted with warm wood floors throughout, this sun-filled residence offers a modern, move-in-ready feel with thoughtful updates that make everyday living easy and stylish. The open layout is ideal for both relaxing and entertaining, while the renovated finishes add a crisp, contemporary touch. The spacious bedroom provides a peaceful retreat, and the updated bath complements the home’s clean, polished aesthetic. Enjoy a full-service building with an impressive suite of amenities, all while living directly across from everything; Metro, shopping, dining, grocery stores, parks, Amazon HQ2, Reagan National Airport, and major commuter routes are just steps away. Whether you’re heading into the city or enjoying the vibrant neighborhood, convenience truly defines this location. An exceptional opportunity for first-time buyers, investors, or anyone seeking low-maintenance living in one of Arlington’s most dynamic communities.

Looking for an updated, spacious, and affordable home in a prime Arlington location? This 828 sq ft one-bedroom condo at The Carlton checks all the boxes. Freshly painted neutral walls with crisp white trim and brand-new carpet create a clean, move-in-ready feel, while floor-to-ceiling windows flood the home with natural light. The updated kitchen features eco-friendly cherry cabinets and bamboo floors and opens seamlessly to the dining area—perfect for everyday living or entertaining. Wall-to-wall closets provide excellent storage, and a private balcony offers a relaxing outdoor retreat. Enjoy resort-style amenities in this secure building including a 24-hour concierge, state-of-the-art fitness center, sauna, Olympic-size pool, grilling areas, tennis courts, and renovated common spaces. Two off-street parking passes. Condo fee includes all utilities except cable and internet. Ideally located across from the W & OD Trail with ART Bus at the front door, Metrobus nearby, and easy access to Shirlington, Columbia Pike, I-395, the Pentagon, and Reagan National Airport. $250 move-in fee. Furnishings may be available for sale. Move-in ready and perfectly positioned—don’t miss this one.

events.eventSubDescription: This was part of a multi-property sale.

marketingRemarks.marketingRemark: Beautifully updated 2-bedroom, 1.5 bath condo 2 level townhome in  convenient and desirable Arlington Village Courtyard. Upper level full bath and a lower level half bath. Thoughtfully renovated, this home showcases a fully upgraded kitchen with brand-new cabinetry, granite countertops, modern flooring, and stainless steel appliances. Both bathrooms have been tastefully refreshed, while the entire residence features gleaming floors, fresh paint, and updated lighting for a crisp, contemporary feel. New HVAC for comfortable living. Step outside to your private back deck—ideal for morning coffee, evening relaxation, or entertaining guests. Additional highlights include a dedicated storage unit and an unbeatable location just two blocks from shops and restaurants. With a Metrobus stop right in the courtyard and Reagan National Airport less than 4 miles away, commuting to DC is effortless. This move-in-ready gem offers the perfect blend of comfort, style, and convenience in one of Arlington’s most desirable communities.

TRANQUILITY!!! If there was one word to describe this home, it would be tranquility! Featuring two beautiful gardens and a 24x24 enclosed patio, this beautifully maintained home has so much to offer any family, first time home buyer, or investor! This gorgeous home boasts three levels of spacious comfortable living with a finished and insulated walk-up attic, perfect for a cozy play room or storage, a large and spacious main level, and fully finished basement. Not only is the basement finished, but it has a full kitchen, bar, and approved plans from Arlington county to add an additional full bathroom AND an additional bedroom making it primed for any investor looking to buy a property that has MASSIVE income producing potential! This home also has a brand new furnace (2024), brand new hard wood flooring on the main level, newly serviced A/C (2024), Porcelain tile in the basement, and  a brand new microwave and stove in the basement kitchen. This home truly is one of a kind in its beauty and size! With not just one but TWO driveways accommodating up to six vehicles, and an attached garage for one vehicle, not only is it one of the largest on the street, but it also sits on one of the largest lots as well. This home combines tranquility and serenity, with the convenience of location and city living! And now it can be yours!

Welcome to the Astoria - one of Arlington's best kept secrets! Unit #237 is an oversized 2-bedroom, 1.5-bath condo and one of the most coveted floor plans in the community, featuring a massive, light-filled sunroom overlooking the serene gardens and patio on the quiet side of the building. It’s a standout space that immediately feels warm, open, and inviting. With nearly 1,000 sq ft of bright, airy living, this home offers dedicated areas for relaxing, entertaining, working, and cooking. The open kitchen with a breakfast bar blends beautifully into the living and dining areas — ideal for casual mornings or hosting friends. The home has been lovingly maintained and updated with a new HVAC system, a refreshed kitchen with stainless steel appliances, and brand-new paint throughout. Completely move-in ready! The owner’s suite features excellent storage and an en suite bath, while the spacious second bedroom makes an ideal office, guest room, or flex space. Oversized closets throughout the home ensure you never run out of storage. The Astoria has also just completed major building upgrades, giving you added peace of mind: New roof New fire panel system Garage fully restored Lobby and all hallways currently being redesigned and refreshed Meeting room/library being updated Even better — the assessment for these improvements has already been paid, and the upgrades come at no cost to you, the new owner. In addition to all conventional financing options, The Astoria offers FHA-approved financing as well, providing excellent flexibility for buyers. Enjoy resort-style amenities including a fitness center, sauna, outdoor pool, tennis courts, grilling area, party room, patio, pet-friendly policies, 24/7 security, garage parking, on-site management, and additional private storage. All of this in an unbeatable location — minutes to shopping, dining, and conveniences, less than ½ mile to the Courthouse and Rosslyn Metro stations for an effortless commute and 2 traffic lights away from Georgetown. Bright, spacious, meticulously maintained, and located in a beautifully improved building — this rare gem won’t last!

When you have everything on your real estate wishlist, then you don’t have to compromise with yourself! Rarely do opportunities like this one present themselves, so here is your chance to call one of the most coveted units in the Astoria "home. "   Unit #237 is one of the most rare floorplans in the buildings — an oversized 2 bedroom / 1.5 bath unit that boasts a MASSIVE and sun-filled enclosed sun room overlooking the buildings courtyard. This particular unit has been lovingly maintained and updated to include recently renovated bathrooms, a refreshed kitchen with newer appliances, and has just been painted to shine! From the moment you enter you’ll be awash with natural light. The open plan has an airy and natural flow and the unit sprawls across nearly 1000 sqft with dedicated spaces for rest, relaxation, culinary explorations, and entertainment! The kitchen offers plenty of cabinet and countertop space that will make any chef happy. The owner’s suite has plenty of storage and a great en suite bathroom. And the extra bedroom is spacious and flexible enough to be used as an office. There are plenty of storage options throughout the unit with several oversized closets and cabinets for all your storage needs. Some of the fantastic amenities include: pet-friendliness, a gym, sauna, outdoor pool, tennis courts, grilling area, party room, patio, 24/7 security, garage parking, on-site management, and extra private storage. They say that real estate is all about location, location, location, and we can’t agree more! Literally outside your front door you’ll find easy access to shopping, dining, and retail. The Courthouse Metro us just 1/2 a mile away making a commute anywhere a breeze!   This one is lovely and we don’t think it will last long!

Discover unmatched value in one of Arlington’s most desirable neighborhoods—perfect for first-time buyers, down-sizers, or savvy investors looking to build equity fast without sacrificing location, convenience, or style. This affordable condo places you just minutes from the Pentagon City Station, top-rated shopping, dining, and your everyday essentials. The Cavendish community offers a lifestyle of comfort and security, featuring dedicated dog-walking areas, a gated outdoor pool, and off-street resident parking. Enjoy added peace of mind with key-fob building access, security cameras, and an intercom system to easily welcome guests to your new place! Your condo is a solid canvas with great potential—light cosmetic updates are recommended. But not to worry, brand new vinyl flooring and an available seller credit up to $10,000 *  could be yours! Enjoy the freedom to personalize the space exactly to your taste. Affordable, well-located, and full of opportunity—this is your chance to step into instant equity in Arlington Virginia!  * Some images have been virtually staged to show potential *  Be sure to ask Your Realtor for more info! Don't have a Realtor? Give me a call to schedule a tour!"

After a long day, coming home to Crystal Gateway feels like a deep exhale. This spacious 2-bedroom, 2-bath residence spans 1,516 square feet and welcomes you with warm wood floors, an open floor plan, and natural light pouring through expansive windows. The upgraded kitchen—anchored by glowing Indian granite and a thoughtfully placed breakfast area—makes everything from a quiet morning coffee to an easy weeknight dinner feel effortless and grounding. Life here is designed to flow with you. Slip through the private underground passage to the fitness center for an evening workout, or unwind in the indoor or outdoor pools, sauna, or library—never needing to step outside. When it’s time to slow down, choose a peaceful moment on the balcony or settle in by the floor-to-ceiling windows. In the primary suite, remote-control blinds close at the touch of a button, and the marble owner’s bath, complete with a separate soaking tub and shower, becomes your own personal retreat. Luxury at Crystal Gateway isn’t just about finishes—it’s about ease and peace of mind. A 24-hour staffed front desk, security cameras, on-site management, full-time engineers, gated parking, and direct indoor Metro access create a rare sense of calm in city living. With beautifully maintained grounds, a resident event suite, and nearby Long Bridge Park, this is more than a home—it’s a lifestyle that restores you, every single day.

Privacy, security, luxury  &  convenience. A condo for the discerning buyer. Upgraded kitchen appliances, beautiful cabinetry, and Indian granite counters. The marble luxurious owner's bath is fully furnished including bidet, separate shower  &  bath, and dual vanities. 24hr front desk, camera security, gated resident parking, on-site manager, full-time bldg engineers  &  underground access to Metro.

Price Listed is Suggested Opening Bid ONLY!  Final Price will be determined at the auction. Quaint single-family home in sought after Penrose in Arlington. This Diamond in the Rough will be the gem of the neighborhood with your updates. Enter in the large foyer with built-in storage, mosey into the family room to relax from the day. The main level also includes a dining room, bedroom with built-in storage, updated full bath and very ample kitchen. Upstairs is a big bedroom and full bath. The basement is accessed at the back of the house and is keyed separately. Basement includes a full eat-in kitchen, full bath, living room, utility room and office. The office can easily be converted to a bedroom with the installation of an egress window. There is a large deck off the back of the house that can be accessed from the kitchen. Back yard is sizable and will be great for entertaining. Bonus that there is a driveway for parking as well as street parking.

*  * To Be Built. Builder offering Financing Incentives - Interest rates as low as 4.5%. Builder assistance available for qualified buyers. Limited-time offer. *  *  Experience timeless design and modern living in this brand-new custom home by Classic Cottages, ideally situated in the heart of Clarendon. The main level offers a beautiful balance of function and style with a private office, elegant powder room, and a stunning gourmet kitchen featuring a large center island. The kitchen flows seamlessly into the great room and dining area—an open, airy layout enhanced by architectural touches such as arched doorways and an eye-catching arched feature wall. Upstairs, you’ll find four spacious bedrooms, including a serene primary suite with a spa-inspired bath showcasing a walk-in shower, stand-alone soaking tub, and generous walk-in closet. A conveniently located laundry room completes this level. The lower level is designed for entertaining, with an expansive recreation room, a wet bar, a flexible bonus space perfect for a gym or media room, and an additional bedroom with full bath—ideal for guests. Outside, a detached shed offers even more versatility—perfect for a home office, workout space, workshop, or creative studio. All of this just moments from the Clarendon Metro, award-winning restaurants, boutique shopping, and vibrant neighborhood amenities. A truly exceptional home in an unbeatable location.

*  * Builder offering Financing Incentives - Interest rates as low as t 4.75%. Builder assistance available for qualified buyers. Limited-time offer. *  *  Introducing a new Classic Cottages custom home between Ballston and Clarendon. This stunning 6-bedroom, 6.5-bathroom home perfectly blends luxury and practicality. With a two-car garage and an expansive open-concept layout, this home offers ample space for both entertaining and everyday living. The gourmet kitchen flows effortlessly into the spacious great room, creating an ideal space for gatherings or family time. Between the kitchen and the mudroom, you'll find a convenient butler's pantry, perfect for additional storage or prepping meals in style. The main level also includes a formal dining room, a private office/guest suite with an en-suite bathroom, and a sleek powder room, Upstairs, the luxurious primary suite offers a generous walk-in closet and a spa-inspired bath with a soaking tub and separate shower. Three additional bedrooms, each with its own en-suite bath and walk-in closet, ensure comfort and privacy. A second-level laundry room adds convenience to this level. The lower level is designed for both fun and flexibility, featuring a large recreation room with a wet bar, a versatile flex room perfect for a home gym or music studio, and a guest bedroom with a full bath. Step outside to the inviting screened porch and deck, perfect for outdoor dining or simply relaxing. Located conveniently between Ballston and Clarendon, this home offers the ideal combination of modern living and convenience, just steps from restaurants, shops, and more!

Welcome to River Place!  Arlington’s Best Value for Location, Lifestyle, and Convenience! 1 Bed | 1 Bath | Private Balcony | Parking Included | All Utilities Included This freshly painted and virtually staged condo features a comfortable, well-designed floor plan that maximizes every square foot. The private balcony provides a welcome extension of your living space that's perfect for a quiet moment outdoors or your morning coffee. This home includes one assigned parking space, an exceptional advantage in Rosslyn, and the condo fee covers all utilities, offering unmatched value and truly stress-free living. Enjoy unbeatable accessibility with the Rosslyn Metro Station (Orange, Blue  &  Silver Lines) less than 10 minutes away, giving you seamless access to Georgetown, downtown D. C. , Amazon HQ2, National Airport, and more. River Place delivers resort-style amenities and everyday convenience, including: • 24-hour gated community with controlled access • Outdoor pool • Fitness center/gym • Dog park • Boutique market, salon/barber, and dry cleaning services on-site • Concierge and community spaces Whether you're a first-time buyer, investor, or looking for a low-maintenance home close to the city, this condo checks all the boxes. With its incredible location, full amenities, and utilities included, this unit is one of Arlington’s smartest opportunities. Schedule your showing today, this one won’t stay available for long!

Under Contract but ACCPETING BACKUP offers!! UPDATED and SPACIOUS corner two-bedroom unit at the Riverplace co-op in the heart of Rosslyn. Sunny bedrooms and private balcony facing the open area, baths in abundant natural light and panoramic views of greenery. Hardwood floor throughout. Over $40,000 in meticulous upgrades. Fully furnished unit with newly renovated kitchen, bathroom. The interior has been thoughtfully redesigned. Both bedrooms provide comfortable spaces for relaxation and personalization. The updated kitchen showcases state-of-the-art stainless-steel appliances shine beautifully with quartz countertops and striking cabinets. The newly renovated bathroom exudes a spa-like ambiance. The property boasts a ceiling-mounted projector and 100” screen, this feature makes it an ideal space for roommates seeking shared entertainment experiences or for those looking to leverage its rental potential. An above ground parking space included (WP-405, parking fee $233.45 per 6 months). Low monthly coop fee ($607) includes all utilities (water, electric, gas, central AC/Heat and common area maintenance). Complex has full-size fitness center with new equipment and outdoor pool, concierge services and 24 hour security patrol. Unbeatable location, adjacent to MT Vernon Trail, 10 minutes walk to Rosslyn Metro (blue / orange / silver line), 25 minutes walk to Georgetown and convenient spot for commuting to downtown DC, Alexandria, Tysons Corner and National Airport. Great rental potential here, Don't miss!

Building Highlights  &  Amenities Include: Built in 1998, 181 total units, an outdoor pool with grilling area, fitness center, a community room, a library/billiards room, three elevators, on-site management and maintenance, secure garage parking, extra storage, and bike storage. Welcome to a beautifully renovated home in the heart of Rosslyn, one of Northern Arlington’s most sought-after neighborhoods. The home’s open layout and refreshed design create a bright and welcoming atmosphere perfect for both relaxing and entertaining. This stunning 2-bedroom, 2.5-bath residence offers thoughtfully updated living space. Step inside to brand-new flooring throughout and an elegantly redesigned kitchen featuring modern cabinetry, sleek quartz countertops, and contemporary finishes that elevate everyday living. All bathrooms have been fully remodeled, offering a clean, modern aesthetic and added comfort. Located in a prime urban setting, this property is just 0.5 miles from the Rosslyn Metro Station, providing effortless access to the entire DMV area. Enjoy unmatched convenience with Ronald Reagan Washington National Airport only 5 miles away and Georgetown just 2 miles across the bridge. This is a rare opportunity to live in an exceptional neighborhood known for its walkability, vibrant dining scene, and proximity to major commuter routes. Don’t miss your chance to own a beautifully upgraded home in one of Arlington’s most desirable locations!!

Experience modern luxury at its finest in this striking new construction by KB Custom Homes, perfectly positioned at the “Top of the Hill” in Arlington. With sweeping neighborhood views and an unbeatable location just minutes from the Pentagon, Amazon HQ2, Shirlington, and DCA, this new built 2025  delivers both elevated design and everyday convenience in one exceptional package. Offering 3,603 square feet of beautifully finished living space, this 5-bedroom, 4-bath residence is a true showcase of craftsmanship and contemporary sophistication. Every detail has been thoughtfully curated, from hardwood flooring throughout all three levels to the dramatic 10-ft ceilings on the main level, 9-ft ceilings upstairs, and 9-ft ceilings in the fully finished  walkout basement, creating volume, light, and an airy sense of scale. At the heart of the home, the European custom-designed kitchen is both stunning and functional, featuring KitchenAid appliances, sleek modern cabinetry, and refined finishes designed to inspire everyday cooking and elevated entertaining alike. The open-concept layout seamlessly connects the living, dining, and kitchen areas, while the dining space opens directly to a trex deck, delivering the ultimate indoor-outdoor living experience. Throughout the home, luxury design elements elevate every space, including engineered hardwood on all three floors, oversized doors, an electric fireplaces, and wood-paneled accent walls with integrated light channels that add warmth. All bathrooms exude spa-level elegance with distinct floating vanities and ceramic tiles imported from Spain, Italy, and Portugal, blending global craftsmanship with modern design. The main-level flexible room offers the perfect option for a home office or guest suite. The upper level is designed as a true retreat. A loft provides a complimentary living space, ideal for family mornings or reading lounge, The primary suite feels like a private sanctuary, featuring a spa-inspired bath with a double shower, dual custom vanity, and a custom-designed walk-in closet thoughtfully built for both style and function. Two additional generously sized bedrooms share this level, along with a convenient laundry room, making everyday living effortless and perfectly organized. While the bright, expansive lower level with a wet bar and recreation area is ideal for entertaining. Step outside and enjoy one of Arlington’s most dynamic locations, just moments from the vibrant dining and boutique scene of Shirlington, with effortless access to parks, trails, cultural attractions, and major commuter routes, minutes to Pentagon city and -15 minutes to Georgetown and DC. , Minutes to DCA   and Amazon HQ, the pentagon this location places opportunity and lifestyle at your doorstep.

This perfectly located property has an enormous backyard and is about a half mile to Clarendon with it's metro stop, restaurants, coffee shops, etc. Fantastic opportunity to own a well-maintained multifamily building with a Total Rental Income of $107,400 Per Year, this property offers dependable rental income and strong tenant demand thanks to its close proximity to the Metro. The two upper units each have 2 bedrooms, and have been freshly painted. The 2 bedrooms in the basement unit have also been renovated, painted, and have new LVP floor and updated bathroom and kitchen areas, with quartz countertops, white cabinets, and stainless steel appliances. The shared laundry room has 2 sets of washers and dryers and the outside features a large backyard with a storage shed, and 4 off-street parking spots.

Step into this beautifully updated 2-bedroom, 2-bath condo where style, comfort, and convenience come together effortlessly. Thoughtfully designed and move-in ready, this home features rich hardwood floors throughout and freshly painted, modern interiors that create a bright and welcoming atmosphere. The spacious kitchen is a true highlight, offering generous counter space and an easy flow into the open-concept living and dining areas—ideal for everyday living and entertaining guests. Elegant crown molding enhances the living room and both bedrooms, adding a refined touch, while recessed lighting throughout the main living spaces and bathrooms enhances the home’s clean, contemporary design. Both bathrooms have been tastefully renovated with high-end marble tile and upgraded, water-efficient toilets. The hallway bath boasts a sleek walk-in shower with a full glass enclosure, combining both luxury and function. An in-unit washer and dryer provide added convenience, and the private balcony offers a peaceful spot to enjoy fresh air and natural light. Residents enjoy access to a wide array of upscale amenities, including concierge service, a fully equipped fitness center, a sparkling pool, business center, two elevators, and even a private theater—perfect for movie nights at home. Garage parking is included, adding to the everyday ease of living here. Located just blocks from the Virginia Square and Ballston Metro stations, as well as Ballston Quarter Mall, trendy restaurants, and scenic trails, this condo places you in the heart of it all. With its blend of sophistication, modern comfort, and unbeatable location, this is urban living at its finest. Schedule your private showing today! This is the one!

You want an updated, stylish, high rise condo in prime Arlington? This special 1-bedroom 6th-floor unit in the Carlton is for you! New luxury plank flooring and fresh paint complement an updated kitchen with new stainless steel appliances (refridgerator, microwave, gas stove/oven, dishwasher, garbage disposal) and quartz countertops. The spacious 828 sq/ft floorplan features a welcoming entry foyer, open living area, dedicated table space, pass-through to kitchen with breakfast bar, and a large bedroom separated from the rest of the apartment by a hallway loaded with storage options. Condo fee includes all utilities and a reserved garage parking spot near the elevators.

Step into this charming and thoughtfully updated 1-bedroom, 1-bath condo located in the vibrant and beautifully maintained community of Horizon House in Arlington. Offering the perfect combination of modern living, generous space, and an unbeatable location, this home puts the best of Arlington right at your doorstep. Ideally situated just 2.5 blocks from the Pentagon City Metro and less than one mile from Amazon HQ2, this condo delivers unmatched accessibility. Floor-to-ceiling sliding glass doors fill the living room, primary bedroom and separate dining area with abundant natural light, creating a warm and inviting atmosphere throughout. Horizon House offers an impressive array of community amenities, including reserved parking, two laundry rooms on every floor, a sparkling outdoor pool, tennis courts, a grilling and picnic area, and professionally landscaped common grounds. Live minutes from everything you need! You're less than half a mile to Harris Teeter, Target, Walgreens, Planet Fitness, and all the dining and retail options of Pentagon Row. Just a short distance to Whole Foods, Costco, The Fashion Centre at Pentagon City, Crystal City, Potomac Yard, Virginia Highlands Park  &  Athletic Fields, and The Pentagon. Schedule your private tour today!

Enjoy cooking in the open kitchen with sleek cabinets, quartz countertops, and smart appliances. The spacious living room and dining room area flow seamlessly, providing an ideal space for relaxation and entertaining. The spacious primary bedroom contains an en-suite full bath and custom-designed walk-in closet. Large windows in the second bedroom maximize space and natural light. For added ease, there is a washer/dryer in the unit and in-unit laundry hookups available. Inside the contemporary mixed-use condo development, the well-maintained common areas reflect pride of ownership. The building, constructed in 2019 with modern architectural design, features an elevator for easy access, secured main entrance, and durable construction materials. The community provides an array of amenities including an onsite 24-hour fitness center/exercise room, entertainment/meeting room, and a large resident courtyard with a fire pit and grills/BBQ grill area perfect for summer gatherings. Practical features include a secured bike storage room and secured package room, reserved/assigned garage parking in the basement, and association fees that cover essential services like common area maintenance, snow removal, and management. Located in a vibrant neighborhood, residents can enjoy nearby parks, shopping, and dining options. The location is convenient and close to restaurants along Columbia Pike, a CVS, Four Mile Run Park, and the W & OD trail. A bus stop is right in front of the building serviced by ART and Metro bus lines, and the Ballston Metro is just 2 miles away.

You have been waiting and here it is!!   Don't miss out!!   Location, Location, Location Explore an exceptional contemporary residence in Lyon Park, Arlington—a newly constructed masterpiece featuring an elevator and a spacious 4-car garage. This luxurious home, spanning approximately 6,787 square feet, is perfectly situated on a picturesque 0.27-acre corner lot. With its two grand entrances, the home unfolds across three beautifully finished levels, including a bonus office/bedroom suite above a detached two-car garage. Inside, discover 8 bedrooms, 8 full baths, and 2 half baths, offering expansive and meticulously crafted living spaces. An elevator ensures effortless movement between all levels, while a state-of-the-art 2-zone HVAC system in the main house, plus a third zone above the garage, provides personalized climate control. The heart of this home is its exquisitely designed kitchen, seamlessly connecting to a welcoming family room with an elegant electric fireplace. This culinary space features an oversized Quartz island, dual sinks, a Miele dishwasher, a professional-grade 48-inch Wolf range with 6 burners and an infrared griddle, a 48-inch Subzero refrigerator, custom cabinet lighting, and a generous pantry. Adjacent, a butler’s pantry with a sink, beverage cooler, Quartz countertops, and custom lighting adds to the convenience and ambience. Step outside to a serene screened-in stone porch with a ceiling fan, overlooking the private, beautifully landscaped fenced backyard. Entertain effortlessly in the sophisticated dining room or work comfortably from the main level front bedroom/office with its own full bath. The luxurious primary suite upstairs boasts a spacious bedroom with an electric fireplace, coffee wet bar with a beverage cooler, a large, customized walk-in closet, a private balcony, and a lavish primary bath featuring a large glass-enclosed shower with dual shower heads and body sprays, dual vanities, a soaking tub, and a separate toilet room. Four additional private ensuite's and a well-equipped laundry room complete this level. The walk-up lower level is an entertainer’s paradise, featuring a signature Quartz bar with a beverage cooler, dishwasher, and glass shelving with custom lighting, a large recreation room, a bedroom with a full bath, and a media room. Outside, the professionally manicured grounds are enhanced by a black aluminum fencing in the front, PVC fencing in the back, permeable pavers driveway, an attached 2-car garage with epoxy flooring and an EV charger, and a detached 2-car garage with epoxy flooring and EV charger as well as an additional office/bedroom suite above this garage. This residence truly embodies contemporary elegance and sophistication. A block to Zitkala-Sa Park and near Clarendon's Metro, restaurants, shops, services, and nightlife. Ring doorbell video cameras at entrances

Home is being sold in "as is" condition and one hour pre-inspections are welcome. Please schedule with listing agent *  * Plat, floorplans, and disclosures under "Documents. " *  * Open House on Sunday, June 11, from 1 to 4 pm *  *  Classic 1920s farmhouse well-sited on a lushly landscaped 11,588 square foot lot near the heart of Clarendon *  * Home is being sold in "as is" condition and offers these recent updates:   *  * 2002-2004:  overhauled plumbing and electrical systems; new roof on main house and copper gutters; stone front porch floor and walkway; Clive Christian kitchen cabinets; built-in bedroom wardrobe  *  * 2014:  replaced upstairs air conditioning system  *  * 2015:  repainted tin roof; installed new roof on detached garage; gas water heater  *  *  2017:  updated kitchen appliances; replaced main level air conditioning system   *  * 2018:  new family room addition including half bath, laundry, and mudroom area built-ins; installed baking area with sink, cabinets, microwave, and wall oven   *  * 2021:  Bosch dishwasher *  *  Follow the meandering garden path to the inviting front porch and then to the foyer *  * High  ceilings, tall windows  and gleaming heart pine wood floors enhance the appeal of the main level with living room, dining room, den, kitchen, family room, bathroom, and powder room *  * Upstairs there are four bedrooms and an updated bathroom *  * Ladder style stairs lead to the attic level which has space for a den and storage *  * The yard is filled with mature trees, shrubbery and perennials *  *  A block to Zitkala-Sa Park and near Clarendon's Metro, restaurants, shops, services, and nightlife *  * This 1920s home awaits a steward who values  convenience, space, and location. *  *

Welcome to this stunning and rare expanded Buckingham model with 3 bedrooms and 2 bathrooms in the highly sought-after Fairlington Commons! LOW Condo fee!  This light-filled home offers an open kitchen equipped with stainless steel appliances, soft-close cabinetry, a pantry, and ample prep space—perfect for everyday cooking or entertaining. The spacious living room features recessed lighting, hardwood floors throughout, and a generous walk-in closet for additional storage. Down the hall, you’ll find a large bedroom with walk-in closet, and an updated bathroom with a soaking tub and heated floors for ultimate comfort! Upstairs, discover two additional bedrooms with fantastic closet space, plus an updated ensuite bathroom complete with heated floors and a beautifully tiled shower. For added convenience, this level includes a brand-new washer and dryer and a generously sized laundry area. Super easy parking on one-way street! Fairlington Commons delivers a truly amenity-rich lifestyle with access to a swimming pool and tennis courts right across the street, and a nearby basketball court, huge playground, and a clubhouse! Residents also love the weekly Sunday Farmers Market and the many community events held throughout the year in this sweet, friendly, neighborhood!  Don’t miss the chance to make this move-in-ready home your own!

Gorgeous 3 bedroom, 2 bathroom Buckingham model home in Fairlington Commons! This renovated, light-filled home features rich wood flooring, recessed lighting, updated windows, &  neutral paint throughout. The main level features a spacious living room with a large walk-in closet equipped with custom shelving. The renovated open kitchen is accented with modern white soft-close cabinetry, upgraded stone countertops, a tile backsplash, &  stainless steel appliances. The separate dining area includes a large pantry with Elfa shelving for extra storage. The side hallway leads to the spacious primary bedroom with a large walk-in closet. A fully updated  &  expanded bathroom with heated floors, a Cambria quartz-topped vanity with soft-close cabinets, &  a custom-tiled shower with an air jet soaking tub completes this level. The upper level features two bedrooms connected by French double pocket doors and a shared ensuite bathroom. The first bedroom features a HUGE customizable Elfa-designed walk-in closet. The other bedroom features a closet  &  access to the extra attic storage. The updated ensuite bathroom is accented with heated floors, a sparkling white tiled glass-enclosed shower with a corner seat and niche shelving, &  a stone-topped vanity with soft-close cabinets. A laundry room with stackable washer  &  dryer completes this home. Community amenities include a pool, tennis courts, tot lots, walking paths, &  MORE! Great location right across from the pool, a short walk to the Fairlington Farmers Market  &  state-of-the-art playground, and close to Shirlington Village, Bradlee Shopping Center, &  Old Town!

Location! Location! Schedule your private tour of this top floor, 2 Bedroom, 2 Bath condo home in West Village of Shirlington. Spacious and open floor plan with recessed lighting throughout features large kitchen with granite counters, an island, and plenty of storage. The dining space is perfect for gathering family and friends. The living room features French door leading to the balcony and has plenty of space to relax and unwind. Your spacious primary bedroom is large enough for a king sized bed, and includes a walk-in closet with built-in shelves, and drawers, and private bath with tub and shower. Second bedroom, and second bath with walk-in shower. Stackable washer/dryer in unit. Parking spot conveys. Community amenities are excellent: outdoor pool, clubhouse and party room, fitness room, business center, a free rush hour commuter shuttle to Pentagon City Metro, and recently installed electric car charging stations. Walk to Shirlington shops, theater  &  restaurants. Close proximity to I-395, Amazon HQ2, Washington Reagan DCA Airport and an easy commute into Washington, D. C. One parking space included with this unit, and storage area can be separately rented. Very dog-friendly community with two local dog parks minutes away. Thank you for showing!

The Jefferson a Monogram Collection property from Sunrise Senior Living) was proudly voted "Best Senior Living Community" by Arlington Magazine readers in the 2023 "Best of Arlington" survey. The Jefferson, which is an independent and active senior community, is located in the heart of Arlington's Ballston neighborhood. When you arrive, you will feel like you have entered a luxury hotel. The Jefferson boasts in-house dining, housekeeping, transportation, pool/spa, fitness room, and other generous amenities in an urban setting with a walkability score of 97. The Jefferson is a 55+ community with a non-optional monthly fee that includes all amenities. The monthly fee for this unit is $4105.00/month plus a condo fee of $262.00/month. Enjoy your own piece of the Ballston skyline with this condominium which is the Adams floor plan offering 1 bedroom, 1 bathroom, plus Den. Beautiful 5th-story views.

Cherry Hill Custom Homes presents this beautiful new construction home in a super-convenient North Arlington location. This home features 6 bedrooms, 6 full bathrooms, and two powder rooms with 7,030 square feet of finished living space over three levels. The main level includes 10ft ceilings, gorgeous wide-plank engineered white oak wood floors, a beautiful gourmet kitchen with frame-less custom cabinetry and quartz countertops and a rear prep kitchen and pantry. The kitchen overlooks a spacious great room with coffered ceiling and gas fireplace with tile surround and a large dining area and butler's pantry surrounded by windows offering abundant natural light. The bluestone patio off of the great room provides an amazing outdoor living space overlooking the backyard. A guest suite, private study, and mudroom with built-in cubbies complete the main level living spaces. The upper level is highlighted by a luxurious primary suite with spacious dual walk-in closets with built-ins, a spa-like bathroom with heated floors, double vanities, stand-alone soaking tub, and heavy glass enclosed shower. The lower level includes a recreation room with wet bar, golf simulator space, exercise room, an additional en-suite bedroom, and a separate powder room. Convenient to Lee Harrison Shopping Center, Chestnut Hills Park, Knights of Columbus, Washington Golf, and much more. Discovery ES/ Williamsburg MS/ Yorktown HS.

Discover elevated living in this stunning 15th-floor, 2 bedroom/2 full bath condo with sweeping panoramic views and a bright, open layout. West-facing windows and a large private, covered balcony create the perfect backdrop for sunset evenings and effortless entertaining. Enjoy the convenience of an in-unit washer/dryer, dedicated garage parking, and a private storage unit. The newly renovated building offers 24-hour security, a modern fitness center, and a refreshing community pool. Located just two blocks from the Metro and moments from Route 50.  Dining, schools, and daily conveniences are all within walking distance, and George Washington University is only minutes away. A refined, high-rise retreat combining luxury, comfort, and unbeatable convenience!

events.eventSubDescription: This was part of a multi-property sale.

marketingRemarks.marketingRemark: Welcome to 1401 N Oak St # G-5. This stunning multi-level condo combines sleek bespoke interiors with sophisticated design and exceptional functionality. Once owned by Congressman Charlie Wilson, unit G-5 has a storied past and has been meticulously updated for those with the most discerning tastes. The open-concept living area features soaring ceilings, an expansive wall of windows, and access to the serene private terrace. On the upper level, a beautifully renovated kitchen showcases custom cabinetry and high-end appliances —perfect for both cooking and entertaining. The primary suite offers a retreat with a luxurious spa-like bath and ample closet space. The second bedroom is generously sized and accompanied by a second fully renovated bath with designer finishes. Enjoy private outdoor space ideal for relaxing or dining al fresco, along with access to premium building amenities including a building gym and rooftop as well as one garage parking space.

Very rarely does a home of this caliber come available with time to customize to your liking!  For those tired of the mundane and seeking a home that features striking contemporary design, generous open spaces, abundant natural light, and luxurious finishes then this is the one. Three finished levels spanning almost 4,500 total square feet provides 5 bedrooms (including 4 upper level bedroom suites!) as well as one additional full bath which creates a flexible floorplan for those desiring a main level bedroom, au pair suite, in law suite, etc! Just a few notable features include: 10 foot ceilings on main level and 9 foot ceilings on bedroom level, high end Bosch Kitchen appliances, entertainers basement fully equipped with stylish wet bar, Andersen casement windows and sliding doors, wide plank white oak flooring through, 48 inch gas fireplace in family room, high end lighting throughout, and security system installed. * Estimated completion is end of Feb 2026 *

This beautifully renovated Cape Cod home offers a perfect blend of modern comfort and classic appeal. Brand new addition of a primary bath on the top floor. This delightful residence features 3 bedrooms and 3 full bathrooms, making it an ideal retreat for those seeking both space and style. The heart of the home boasts upgraded countertops and recessed lighting, enhancing the warm ambiance. A jetted tub in the bathroom invites relaxation, while the electric fireplace adds a touch of warmth and charm during cooler evenings. The kitchen is equipped with modern appliances, including an electric oven/range, refrigerator, dishwasher, and a convenient front-loading washer and dryer. The tankless water heater ensures endless hot water, making daily routines a breeze. Double-pane windows provide energy efficiency and a peaceful atmosphere, allowing you to enjoy the tranquility of your surroundings. Outside, the property features a lovely patio area, perfect for morning coffee or evening gatherings under the stars. The brick driveway offers ample parking for you and your guests, while a shed provides additional storage for your outdoor essentials. The Lyonhurst community is known for its friendly atmosphere and convenient access to local amenities. Residents enjoy nearby parks, shops, perfect for leisurely strolls or picnics. The neighborhood is also well-served by public services, ensuring a comfortable and connected lifestyle. With major renovations completed in 2023, this home is in excellent condition, ready for you to move in and make it your own, where every detail has been thoughtfully considered to create a true sense of home. * Featured in “The Arlington Connection” and "Best Address" with Joe Himali! *  Located at the quiet junction of McLean, Arlington, and Falls Church, this extraordinary custom LEED Gold-certified home combines thoughtful design, hand-curated Craftsman aesthetics, and precision engineering to achieve more than twice the energy efficiency of an average home. Flooded with natural light from oversized windows, 10ft ceilings on the main floor create expansive and inviting spaces, while warm wood accents and artisanal stonework impart traditional Craftsman charm. The open-concept floorplan is perfect for relaxing or entertaining, allowing family, friends, and guests to simultaneously enjoy the grand stone fireplace and gourmet kitchen, complete with custom maple cabinetry, onyx soapstone countertops, and top-tier Energy Star and Bosch appliances. French doors open onto an expansive backyard patio with an outdoor kitchen and grill surrounded by an organic garden, offering additional entertainment possibilities on warm evenings. Every element of this home has been thoughtfully designed to optimize comfort and efficiency. From heated stone floors and custom window treatments, to flexible closet configurations that maximize storage options, no detail has been overlooked. Upstairs, an expansive master suite enjoys a private, screened balcony and a stunning marble bathroom with separate shower, soaking tub, and wrap-around dual vanity. En suite bathrooms in three of the four other generously-sized bedrooms ensure that this home can grow with your family and offer plenty of options for guests. The large, fully-finished basement includes a 2-car drive-in garage, mudroom, workshop, and additional storage areas perfect for an exercise room and wine cellar. A masterpiece of energy-efficient design, this LEED Gold-certified property boasts a two-zone, multi-stage geothermal heating and cooling system, on-demand European-style hot water heaters, and state-of-the-art insulation technology to drive utility bills down to a bare minimum in the height of summer and dead of winter. With an energy-recovery ventilation (ERV) fresh air system, durable metal roof primed for solar installation, and rainwater catchment-fed landscaping irrigation, smart engineering seamlessly harnesses nature’s efficiencies for your benefit. Located in the Fairfax County Public School District, this home feeds into Haycock Elementary School, Longfellow Middle School, and Mclean High School. Just over a mile from East Falls Church Metro and Rt. 66, it provides easy commuting options to both Washington, DC and bustling Tyson's Corner. Street power lines have been edited out of the listing photos to better display the home's facade.

Don't miss this beautiful 2 level 1 bedroom brick townhouse in peaceful Arlington Village. BRAND NEW PAINT, KITCHEN, HVAC, and NEST THERMOSTAT. The large living room has parquet hardwood floors, wide crown molding, and a roomy coat closet. The light-filled, eat-in kitchen has been completely updated with BRAND NEW CABINETS, STONE TILE FLOORING, SS APPLIANCES, QUARTZ COUNTERTOPS, AND GLASS BACKSPLASH. The kitchen also features a laundry closet with energy efficient Bosch washer and dryer. Located off the kitchen you will find the RESTAINED deck perfect for entertaining or grilling with views of a lush courtyard. From the deck, you will find BRAND NEW PAVERS that will lead you to a secure bike room and community laundry room as well as an assigned extra storage bin for your use. Ascend the stairs to the second floor and you will find a spacious landing wide enough for furnishings and a large linen closet. In the big bedroom you will find beautiful hardwood floors, 2 sunny windows, 2 good-size closets, a siting or desk area, and enough room for a king-size bed and other large furnishings. There is a white ceramic tile bath across the hall with UPDATED FIXTURES, MIRROR, AND HANGING CABINET. Lots of reserved unassigned parking can be found on Barton Street. Enjoy summer swimming in the community pool or a game of tennis on the private courts. There is a trail through the woods on the property and many shopping opportunities close by. Giant grocery and a Sunday Farmers Market on Edgewood St make for easy food shopping. There are also many diverse restaurants and small shops, a County Recreation Center, library, and a Cinema and Draft House within walking distance. Excellent bus service and close proximity to Pentagon Metro make for easy commutes. From this lively central Arlington location it is easy to get to I-395, I-66 or Routes 1, 7 and 50.

Excellent bus service and close proximity to Pentagon Metro make for easy commutes. From this lively central Arlington location it is easy to get to I-395, I-66 or Routes 1, 7 and 50.

*  *  * Meet the builder and discuss options! Off-site open house at 6301 31st St N Arlington, VA 22207. Saturday, November 22nd 1-3 PM. *  *  *  Delivering Summer 2026 by award-winning BODE Residential. This Organic Modern new construction offers 4,583 square feet across four finished levels. Built with a focus on quality and thoughtful design, this home features a true 4-stop elevator connecting the garage level, main level, bedroom level, loft, and rooftop terrace. The home features 6 bedrooms and 6 bathrooms, including a full loft suite. The main level has 10-foot ceilings, oversized Pella casement windows, custom Visual Comfort lighting, and an open kitchen with quartz counters, custom cabinetry, a panel-ready Liebherr refrigerator, a Wolf range, a Bosch dishwasher, a Sharp microwave drawer, and an island with a 4-seat integrated table. The main-level bedroom can also serve as an office. The upper level includes an owner's suite with heated bathroom floors, a frameless glass shower, a soaking built-in tub, a floating double vanity, and two walk-in closets. Two additional bedrooms and the laundry room are also located on this level. The loft level offers a bedroom suite, a wet bar, and access to the rooftop terrace. The terrace includes tile flooring, metal railing, gas and electric hookups, and pre-wiring for speakers and lighting. The loft suite features vaulted ceilings up to 12 feet. The basement level includes 9-foot ceilings, a bedroom and bathroom, an entertainment area, storage, and a mudroom off the two-car garage. Interior finishes include warm white oak hardwood floors on the main and upper levels, LVP flooring in the basement, solid core interior doors with 8-foot doors on the main level, custom closet systems, modern trim, and wood railing with metal balusters. Additional features include Pella casement and fixed windows, recessed LED lighting with custom fixtures throughout, 400 amp electrical service, Navien tankless hot water, Ecobee smart thermostats, Cat6 wiring to every room, in ceiling speakers, WiFi access point wiring on every level, a smart doorbell, concrete driveway, full glass garage door, and a stucco exterior with wood accents and metal roof details.

NEWLY RELEASED AND LAST REMAINING NEW CONSTRUCTION END UNIT in Arlington's premier luxury townhome community IRVING + NINTH – where unparalleled accessibility meets exceptional quality craftsmanship. ONLY 2 UNITS REMAIN. Discover the perfect balance of suburban tranquility and urban convenience in Clarendon's Lyon Park, one of Arlington, Virginia's most dynamic and desirable neighborhoods. This rare opportunity offers modern luxury living with timeless neighborhood charm, steps from Metro and minutes from Downtown DC. Live in the heart of it all with walkable access to Clarendon's top-rated restaurants, boutique shopping, artisan cafés, and vibrant nightlife. Enjoy morning runs through Lyon Park, Rocky Run Park, or along the scenic Custis Trail. The Clarendon Metro Station is just blocks away, while immediate access to GW Parkway, I-66, and I-395 makes your commute to Downtown Washington DC, the Pentagon, Crystal City, or National Landing effortless. This is Arlington living at its finest. This stunning 4-bedroom, 4-bathroom end unit townhome spans 2,000 square feet of sophisticated open-concept living space. Wide plank engineered white oak hardwood floors flow throughout, complemented by sleek contemporary trim and oversized windows that flood the home with natural light. The show-stopping gourmet kitchen features a dramatic waterfall edge quartz peninsula, abundant custom cabinetry, walk-in pantry, and premium induction cooktop – a dream for home chefs and entertainers alike. All four spa-inspired ensuite bathrooms showcase furniture-style vanities and designer finishes. The crown jewel is your private rooftop terrace with sweeping urban views – the ultimate outdoor entertaining space or peaceful retreat. A spacious two-car garage with EV charging capabilities provides secure, convenient parking. Unlike cramped high-rise condo living, this Irving + Ninth townhouse delivers exceptional space, privacy, and a true sense of home ownership, while fostering genuine community connection with your neighbors. Don't miss this exclusive opportunity to own a luxurious end unit townhome in one of Arlington's most walkable, Metro-accessible neighborhoods. Schedule your private showing today!

Tucked into the heart of Arlington’s Ballston-Virginia Square corridor, this condo in the desirable ARC 3409 building delivers polished metro living with no compromises. Find everything you’re looking for and more than you expect here, right where you want to be. Don’t miss the Open House Sat  &  Sun 1-4.

Discover the epitome of urban luxury in this stunning 2-bedroom, 2-bathroom condo located in the prestigious Woodbury Heights. Nestled in the heart of downtown, this contemporary high-rise offers breathtaking city views that transform every moment into a picturesque experience. Step inside to find a beautifully designed space featuring high-end stainless steel appliances, including a sleek refrigerator, dishwasher, and stacked washer/dryer for ultimate convenience. Experience modern living at its finest in this sun-drenched 2 bed, 2 bath condo at Courthouse Arlington, steps from the metro. Renovated and move in ready, the spacious open floor plan is  designed to maximize space and storage. Bedrooms and bathrooms are strategically placed on opposite ends for optimal privacy. The living and dining areas seamlessly flow onto an expansive balcony that offers breathtaking views and afternoon sun. The kitchen, boasting plentiful cabinets and counter space, includes a breakfast bar with balcony views. Living area is oversized and a full sized open dining area allows for entertaining. Both bedrooms feature multiple closets, full renovated bathrooms, and abundant natural light. Additional storage includes a hall closet and a laundry closet off the foyer. A deeded indoor garage parking spot (101 on P4) and bike storage enhance convenience. Storage cage comes with unit. Nestled in the vibrant Courthouse neighborhood, you'll enjoy a weekly farmer's market a block away, proximity to Amazon HQ2, National Landing, Georgetown, DCA, and the Pentagon. The Courthouse Metro (Orange and Silver lines) is just 1/4 mile away, with Clarendon and Rosslyn Metros (Orange, Silver, and Blue lines) each less than a mile away. Woodbury Heights amenities include an outdoor oasis, tropical gardens, pool, lounge, fitness room, front desk concierge, and on-site management office on P2. Hot water is included in the HOA and the pool is open for summer. Surrounded by a plethora of dining, shopping, educational, and entertainment options, as well as parks, this condo offers a lifestyle of unparalleled comfort, convenience, and enjoyment.

Welcome to your dream home in the heart of Arlington! This beautifully updated 2-bedroom, 2.5-bath Townhouse condo is move-in ready and packed with modern upgrades, offering the perfect blend of comfort, style, and convenience. Spacious Layout: 2 bedrooms, 2.5 bathrooms on 2 levels, with a lower-level walkout to gorgeous yard. Modern Kitchen (Renovated 2020): Featuring sleek stainless steel appliances and elegant quartz countertops, it's always a pleasure to cook in this open kitchen. Gorgeous Upgraded Flooring: Hardwood bamboo floors were installed in 2020 for a warm, contemporary feel. Updated HVAC: Brand new system just installed in July 2025 for year-round comfort! Wood blinds in primary and guest bedrooms, plus cellular shade top-down, bottom-up cordless blinds for sliding door. The community is updating their courtyard (expected completion 10/2025) and Columbia Pike is being updated/repaved (expected completion 12/2025). Just 1.5 miles (5 minutes) from Pentagon Station metro, with a metro bus stop at the corner of Rolfe and Columbia Pike. It's only steps from Towers Park and Washington Blvd Trail, offering tennis courts, a volleyball court, two dog parks, a playground, and a biking/walking/running trail. It's only 3 miles from Washington, D. C. , with unbeatable access to I-395 and Ronald Reagan National Airport. Capital Bike Share station now located next to the community for convenience. Don't miss this opportunity! Schedule a showing today.

Perfectly positioned on a quiet cul-de-sac just two stop lights from DC, this beautifully maintained home combines modern elegant upgrades with everyday convenience. Recent improvements—outside contemporary front and garage doors, and inside modern stair line-railing and updated bathrooms—to name a few, give the home a fresh feel from the moment you arrive. The spacious gourmet kitchen is the heart of the home, fully updated and open to the living room, dining area, and expansive deck with a beautiful gazebo. The backyard feel of a private treehouse far from neighbors, awaits the new owners. It’s an entertainer’s dream, allowing seamless flow indoors and out. Additional highlights include:  * Lower level ideal for au pair or in-law suite  * Grand family room with cozy fireplace and separate exercise room  *  Nestled among 80 foot trees, an enclosed, tree-lined sunroom that opens on three sides  *  Newer roof (2018) and Dual-zoned HVAC with two new compressors  *  Custom cabinetry + California Closets throughout  *  Short 10 minute walk to Donaldson Run Pool, and bike lanes galore to the numerous Metro trails. *  Professionally landscaped yard with sprinkler system  *  Extensive storage — both attic-length and under-deck storage  *  4-room generator for peace of mind  *  More than 80 restaurants and eateries within 1.5 miles Walkable to Taylor Elementary and Dorothy Hamm Middle School, this home offers location, style, and privacy.

Beautifully maintained bi-level in sought after DOVER BALMORAL. Original owners. Minutes from DC. Quiet neighborhood w/ private backyard deck, spacious sunroom off main level  &  large, sun-filled living room, excellent for entertaining. Custom breakfast area w/ built-in washer/dryer. Lower level features large family room, 4th BR, second washer/dryer hook-up and possible 5th BR or kitchenette.

*  * Cherrydale Condo – Updated  &  Move-In Ready *  *  Nestled in the heart of  *  * Cherrydale *  * , this beautifully updated 1-bedroom, 1-bath condo offers the perfect blend of comfort and convenience. Enjoy effortless access to renowned dining, neighborhood parks, and an easy commute with Virginia Sq–GMU Metro just 1.4 miles away and the ART 55 bus stop steps from your door. Popular local favorites—including Lee Heights Shops, Stratford Park, Heidelberg Bakery, Bob  &  Edith’s, Metro 29 Diner, and Safeway—are minutes away. Inside, natural light streams through a dramatic  *  * wall of windows *  * , opening to a spacious private  *  * balcony *  * . The welcoming foyer sets a refined tone, flowing into the bright living area with a flexible nook—ideal for a home office or extra storage. The refreshed  *  * 2025 kitchen *  *  features sleek countertops, stainless steel appliances, a new sink and faucet, and modernized cabinetry. A separate dining room provides the perfect setting for entertaining. The well-proportioned  *  * bedroom *  *  easily fits a queen-sized bed with nightstands and offers double-door access to an oversized walk-in closet. The  *  * updated bathroom *  *  shines with a new vanity, sink, faucet, toilet, showerhead, and lighting. Storage is abundant with three additional closets plus a dedicated basement storage unit. *  * Building amenities include: *  *   *   *  * ALL utilities included *  *   *  Fitness room  *  Rooftop access (perfect for July 4th fireworks!)  *  Party  &  conference rooms  *  Package and call box entry systems  *  Laundry and trash rooms on every floor  *  Bike storage  *  * Parking: *  *  One included lot space with a resident pass, plus ample street parking. This turnkey condo offers low-maintenance living with a vibrant Arlington lifestyle right outside your door!

marketingRemarks.marketingRemark: What's so special about this property?   #105 was the developer's choice for a sales model. #105 has the distinction of an adjoining roomy private terrace  (bordering a landscaped courtyard) that delivers bonus exterior/entertaining space. Windsor Plaza - a solid boutique building with a sparkling pool tucked away on a quiet no-through residential side street mere steps to Ballston Metro Station (Orange/Silver Lines), a minute's drive to I66 ramps, off the charts walk-ability to running/bike trails, groceries, drugstore, eateries, bars, movies, yoga/gyms, library, medical/dental facilities and much more . Everything you likely need/want is close at hand. More?  Brazilian cherry hardwood floors, 2024 HVAC and 2024 Washer/Dryer. Two secure garage parking spaces convey; P185 and C7.  Don't need two?  Collect some rent from a neighbor seeking extra parking. A quiet retreat smack dab on the Metro corridor.

Welcome to 945 South Scott Street, a spacious, sun-filled two-level condo offering nearly 1,200 square feet of fully renovated living in the heart of Arlington. This modern 2 bedroom, 2.5 bathroom residence has been thoughtfully updated from top to bottom, blending stylish finishes with functional design to create the perfect urban retreat. The main level showcases an open-concept layout and design flooded with natural light. Featuring contemporary LVP flooring, recessed lighting, crown molding, wood burning fireplace and a renovated kitchen with stainless steel appliances, granite countertops and ample cabinetry w/ pass through. A convenient half bath, two large storage closets and an expansive balcony overlooking quiet greenspace complete the main level making it perfect for entertaining or relaxing after a long day. The upper level offers two generously sized bedrooms and two beautifully renovated full bathrooms. The primary suite features an ensuite bath with dual vanity and spacious closet along with views of the DC skyline and firework viewing. The second bedroom offers flexibility for guests, a home office or even a gym. Enjoy the convenience of in-unit laundry, assigned parking and low condo fee. Prime location affords easy access to major commuter routes, Metro and public parks—all just blocks away from Arlington’s best restaurants, shopping, and nightlife. Don’t miss this incredible opportunity to own a turn-key, move-in ready home in one of Northern Virginia’s most desirable locations. Welcome home!
